ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course where the race was held */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the race */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., GF, VSft, Sft, GS) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight range of the horses in the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of horses that can participate in a race at this course */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., turf, dirt) */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the course */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Total length of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer of the horse */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "sire" TEXT /* Sire (father) of the horse */,
  "dam" TEXT /* Dam (mother) of the horse */,
  "last_medical_check" TEXT /* Date of the last medical check-up */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* History of any injuries the horse has had */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the jockey in years */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Current weight of the jockey */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the jockey */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the jockey */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the jockey */,
  "special_notes" TEXT /* Any special notes or comments about the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the trainer in years */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the trainer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the trainer */,
  "special_notes" TEXT /* Any special notes or comments about the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the horse in the race */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "finishing_time" TEXT /* Time taken to finish the race */,
  "odds" TEXT /* Betting odds for the horse */,
  "prize_money_won" TEXT /* Prize money won by the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_horses" (
  "race_horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race-horse combination */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "finishing_time" TEXT /* Time taken to finish the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_horses_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_horses_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_jockeys" (
  "race_jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race-jockey combination */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the jockey in the race */,
  "finishing_time" TEXT /* Time taken to finish the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_jockeys_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_jockeys_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., horse owner, trainer, jockey, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
